Defines constants for notification storage file size and minimum increment size for compression.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines constants related to notification storage management. The `NOTIFICATION_STORAGE_FILE_SIZE` macro specifies the size of the notification storage file as 30 kilobytes. The `NOTIFICATION_STORAGE_MINIMUM_INCREMENT_SIZE` macro defines the minimum amount of space to free when compressing the storage, set to one-fourth of the total storage file size. These definitions help manage the storage space by determining when and how much data to compress, balancing the frequency of compression with data retention.
